# AS Media Services

> Printing, signage, fabrication, and branding company based in New Delhi, India. Operating since 2013, AS Media Services provides end-to-end visual branding — from large-format printing and premium signage to metal fabrication and pan-India installation.

## About

AS Media Services helps businesses create high-impact visual experiences. We work with startups, retail stores, corporate offices, builders, and real estate and national brands across India. Everything is handled under one roof: design, printing, fabrication, branding, logistics, and installation.

- Founded: 2013
- Location: New Delhi, India (serving Pan-India)
- Experience: 10+ years, 500+ projects delivered, 45+ team members

## Services

- Digital & Large Format Printing — vinyl, flex, UV, canvas, HP Latex, floor graphics
- Signage Solutions — ACP signboards, LED signboards, glow sign boards, 3D letters, acrylic & metallic signage
- Retail & In-Store Branding — shop branding, office upgrades, wall graphics, window vinyl
- Fabrication Services — unipole, metal & structural fabrication, outdoor installations
- Promotional Displays — standees, roll-up banners, MDF cutouts, selfie points, exhibition branding
- Vehicle & Transit Branding — transit branding, vehicle graphics, mobile advertising

## Infrastructure

10 ft solvent printers, eco-solvent printing machines, HP Latex technology, CNC router machines, laser cutting machines, vinyl plotters, in-house fabrication, and welding & structural fabrication facilities.

## Selected Clients

Tata Housing, Hero Homes, M3M, Smart World, Emaar Properties, Vivo, Century Ply, CP Plus, Central Park, Paras Buildtech, Ambience Group, Amar Ujala.
